chunks.text: Course: CS 198 | EECS at UC Berkeley CS 198. Directed Group Studies for Advanced Undergraduates Catalog Description: Group study of selected topics in Computer Sciences, usually relating to new developments. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: COMPSCI 198 Prerequisites: 2.0 GPA or better; 60 units completed. Formats: Fall: 1-4 hours of directed group study per week Spring: 1-4 hours of directed group study per week Grading Basis: Pass/Not Pass Final Exam Status: No Class Schedule (Spring 2026): CS 198-2 – MoWeFr 11:00-11:59, Soda 606 – Dan Garcia CS 198-3 – Mo 19:00-20:59, Soda 330 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://forms.gle/ZeyMz68AkujZrzzj6 CS 198-8 – Tu 19:00-20:59, – Class Notes - Class will meet in MLK 171 (OCF Lab) - Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScbah-cHWgBQmH8Gh3BSTTfTLkdxozNH_7tIW_Y6Rbjaax7Jg/viewform CS 198-99 – We 18:30-19:59, Physics Building 3; Th 18:30-19:59, Physics Building 2 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfZpLvil5TvY2QNWlSenUTdOAgg-PKIdsaA6NFeKyCTmmskig/viewform?usp=header CS 198-142 – We 17:00-17:59, – Class Notes Class will be held in Soda 380 CS 198-303 – Fr 19:00-20:59, Soda 330 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://forms.gle/ZeyMz68AkujZrzzj6 Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
